Founded to foster collaboration, creativity, and social responsibility among students, it organizes regular workshops, guest speaker events, and campus-wide festivals. Membership is open to all enrolled students regardless of their department. The club operates under the Dean of Students office and receives annual funding for its core activities. Recent projects include community outreach programs, technical hackathons, and cultural exhibitions.
